sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the yellow square
# Yellow is at rows 20-21, cols 24-25
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 20, 'col': 24}])
print("After clicking yellow square:")
print("  board_changed:", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("\nYellow objects before:")
for n in before:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, hash={n['hash']}")

print("Yellow objects after:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, hash={n['hash']}")

# Check ascii for left side
ascii = current_frame.ascii
lines = ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft side (rows 18-44, cols 5-25):")
for i in range(18, 45):
    if i < len(lines):
        row_str = lines[i][5:26] if len(lines[i]) > 25 else lines[i][5:]
        if any(c not in 'c' for c in row_str):
            print(f"  {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
